allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse src | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object')

Bash(cp ../zsuzsicrm/.git/refs/heads/main /dev/null 2>/dev/null; git show main:supabase/migrations/20260629000001_fix_capacity_trigger.sql > supabase/migrations/20260629000001_fix_capacity_trigger.sql && ls supabase/migrations/ | tail -5)
